entities.name: Ilya
entities.context: Proposes bounding strategies to manage risk in the offer

entities.name: job descriptions
entities.context: One leg of the triangle to bound; capped per year with overage pricing

entities.name: seats
entities.context: Number of recruiters/users included in the offer; capped with add-on pricing per extra seat

entities.name: time
entities.context: Contract duration bounding (six-month or one-year contracts) to contain risk to fixed period

entities.name: unit economics
entities.context: Core concern about keeping usage costs healthy under heavy usage

entities.name: recruiters
entities.context: Users whose seats are capped in the pricing model

entities.name: salesperson
entities.context: Hears the structural choices (job descriptions, seats, time) in sales conversations

entities.name: overage pricing
entities.context: Pricing model for job descriptions exceeding the annual cap

entities.name: add-on pricing
entities.context: Pricing model for extra seats beyond the included number
